text: To live a healthy life, focus on four main areas. First, eat a balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains while limiting processed foods. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, keeps your body strong. Don’t forget about sleep—aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover. Finally, pay attention to your mental health. This means managing stress through relaxation activities or hobbies. A good work-life balance is also important. Set boundaries between your job and personal time so you can relax, connect with loved ones, and recharge.
